task_completion.description: The BigFivePersonalityTraits dataset is loaded into JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP data view shows the dataset with columns such as 'Neuroticism', 'Extraversion', 'Openness', 'Agreeableness', and 'Conscientiousness'.

task_completion.description: The required variables are assigned to the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis control panel (e.g., Repeated Measures ANOVA), 'Neuroticism', 'Extraversion', and 'Openness' are placed in the assigned variables/cells box.

task_completion.description: Forbidden variables are excluded from the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Agreeableness' and 'Conscientiousness' remain in the available variables list and are NOT present in the assigned variables/cells box.

task_completion.description: The Friedman non-parametric test is executed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP results pane on the right displays a table explicitly titled 'Friedman Test' or shows Friedman test results under the non-parametric section.

task_completion.description: Kendall's W is included as the effect size in the results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Friedman test results table in the JASP results pane includes a column or metric for 'Kendall's W'.

task_completion.description: The analysis is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog shows the file being saved as 'Friedman_Analysis.jasp' in '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/', or the JASP application title bar updates to 'Friedman_Analysis'.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with JASP menus, variable assignment boxes, and settings, rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: The results appear as genuine JASP output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results pane displays properly formatted JASP HTML/CSS tables, not raw text or pasted images.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy or download a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a logical progression of steps (loading data, selecting variables, viewing results, saving) rather than just a sudden appearance of the final .jasp file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Friedman_Analysis.jasp'. The required variables for the analysis are 'Neuroticism', 'Extraversion', and 'Openness'. The variables 'Agreeableness' and 'Conscientiousness' must be excluded. In JASP, Kendall's W is computed automatically when the Friedman test is run, so no separate checkbox is required for it.
